case_title: DANIEL SCHER VS. SAUDIA THOMAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $105.00 SERVED OCT-22-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, STEVEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF DANIEL SCHER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SAUDIA THOMAS AND STTEVEN THOMAS ARE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 [SC-100 STAMPED 'BY FAX'] FILED BY SCHER, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, SAUDIA THOMAS, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHER, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, SAUDIA THOMAS, STEVEN $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
